goal: Remediate one remaining M6-RC blocker by making exported Docker runtimes package the real Transformers/PEFT LoRA backend dependencies required by packages/agent-runtime/loaders/transformers_lora.py. Keep scope limited to dependency packaging, focused tests, evidence, and LLM handoff. Do not create fake adapters, do not weaken validation, do not claim real trained adapter inference is complete, and do not mark M6-RC GO without actual no-fake-backend endpoint evidence.
head: fee0795
blocked_scope: Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Pretending a fixture adapter is trained
Weakening model cache validation, verifier validation, auth, or endpoint behavior
Changing training wrappers or model catalog policy
M6-RC GO/sign-off changes before real adapter endpoint evidence or release-policy decision
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update the exported runtime dependency manifest, the Docker export handler if it controls dependency installation, focused tests, evidence artifacts, and WORKING.md. Large model/cache/adapter artifacts must remain outside git.
required_evidence: Focused read of Docker export dependency path
Focused test proving exported Docker runtime dependency manifest includes real backend dependencies
If a Docker rebuild is feasible, dependency import probe from rebuilt image
Explicit note that real trained adapter inference remains unproven without a real adapter and no-fake-backend endpoint transcripts
warnings: This gate can remove the exported-image dependency blocker but cannot produce a trained adapter without a real training artifact/environment.
Do not download or commit model weights, adapter weights, or cache directories.
Do not claim M6-RC GO from dependency packaging alone.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped implementation contract for exported Docker real backend dependency packaging.
phase_notes.audit: Focused read completed for export.py, export_docker.py, Dockerfile.cuda, requirements-runtime.txt, M6 implementation guide, root requirements.txt, and export tests. Dockerfile installs requirements-runtime.txt, and export.py copies that same file into zip and Docker contexts.
phase_notes.build: Added real Transformers/PEFT LoRA inference dependencies to requirements-runtime.txt and focused tests that lock the runtime/Docker requirements contract.
phase_notes.check: Focused export tests, temp Docker build/import probe, strict model catalog verification, contract JSON validation, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check passed for closeout.
phase_notes.done: Evidence recorded in artifacts/review/docker_real_backend_deps_evidence.md. Dependency packaging for new exports is verified, but M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter endpoint evidence exists or release policy explicitly accepts fixture-adapter evidence.

pabcd.approved_scope: Exported Docker runtime dependency packaging, focused tests, evidence, and operational handoff.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No fake trained-adapter claims, no model/adapter artifacts in git, no release GO changes.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
